examples: Plates, sheets, coils of polyisobutylene with man-made felt.
The new telechelic prepolymers of polyisobutylene have been synthesized by the carbocationic polymerization.
The certified reference material mainly consists of polyisobutylene and hexadecane with good homogeneity and stability.
